summary:
END TIMES EXPECTATION AND DIVINE HEALING: Brandon shares his conviction that the return of Jesus Christ is imminent, emphasizing that the signs of the times are visible to all who are spiritually awake. He encourages believers to maintain an expectation of a great harvest of souls and unprecedented miracles, including creative healings like the restoration of missing limbs and organs. Brandon urges his listeners not to be burdened by financial crises, wars, or plagues, but rather to rely on the finished work of Jesus and the power of His blood. He highlights the importance of speaking life, demonstrating this by explaining how he anoints his family, home, and pets with oil to protect them from evil, drawing inspiration from ministers like Billy Burke.

GLOBAL NEWS AND DOMESTIC THREATS: Brandon reviews recent global and domestic news events, interpreting them as prophetic warnings. He discusses reports of Iranian drone and missile strikes on bases in Kuwait and Iraq, noting he had previously received warnings to pray for military installations and the USS Abraham Lincoln. Turning to domestic issues, Brandon highlights the prevention of a mass shooting in Seattle and the deployment of Boston Dynamics robots to patrol World Cup facilities in Dallas for nuclear or biological threats. He also voices concerns over trains carrying chemicals in the United States, warning of potential derailment plots involving explosive devices. Additionally, Brandon mentions reports of mysterious men emerging from New York City sewers, connecting this to a vision he had of explosive devices causing devastating floods in the subways from the East River and the Hudson.

PROPHETIC VISIONS AND WORLD EVENTS: Brandon shares profound visions regarding future catastrophic and political events. He discusses a massive meteorite that fell over New England, relating it to a vision of an even larger asteroid heading toward Earth that authorities will fail to shoot down with missiles. According to Brandon, this future asteroid will be split by lasers before crashing into the Atlantic Ocean, causing the water to boil and mass aquatic death near Miami and Puerto Rico. On the political front, Brandon reacts to discussions about Cuba sponsoring terrorism, prophesying a major governmental flip and a subsequent revival led by figures like Marco Rubio and JD Vance. He also warns against globalist agendas, referencing Tony Blair's push for digital biometric IDs tied to financial services and future pandemic vaccines.

SPIRITUAL REVIVAL AND PRAYER FOR LEADERS: Brandon transitions into a deep time of worship and prayer, calling for a total surrender to Jesus Christ and a rejection of worldly addictions and compromises. He prophesies coming revivals across various regions, including a major outpouring in Branson, Missouri, and a tangible blanket of God's presence over Minnesota. His prophetic declarations extend globally, foreseeing revivals in Africa where new, uncompromising leaders will rise, as well as spiritual awakenings in South America, Asia, and the Middle East. Concluding his intercession, Brandon prays for the physical health and divine protection of several prominent figures, including ministers like Billye Brim, John Kilpatrick, and Perry Stone, as well as political leaders such as Donald Trump, his family members, Marco Rubio, and JD Vance.
rawData: [June 03, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/EIT61ZA5ExU]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again today. We're going to pray tonight. And I get excited because every day I turn on the news, when Braden updates me on all the things he finds throughout the day, he says, "Daddy, this is it." It just gets—the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ, you can see the signs of the times all around us. You have to be completely spiritually dead to not see it. I don't see how anybody could say, "Oh no, Brandon, Jesus is not coming back for a long time." I'm like, "No, look around you. Jesus is coming. It's time to get excited." If you are a believing believer who has their eyes to the sky, you're looking inside your heart, your lamp is full of oil, you know that Jesus Christ is coming and he's coming sooner than we think because you have that expectation. You feel it inside. Especially if you're his beloved, you're his bride. The bride knows. Why? Because they have intimacy. They know that the groom is right there. Jesus Christ is standing at the door. And I truly believe we're about to see the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before. They're words of warning the Lord gives me. But I do have this to tell you: Jesus Christ is coming and he has a plan for your life, and healing and deliverance belongs to you. And I believe with all my heart we're about to see arms grow out, legs grow out, eyes come back when you had no eyes. Maybe you need a new kidney. Maybe you need a new liver. Maybe you need a new something. But with Jesus, all things are possible to him who believes. And I believe in this generation right now, we're about to see signs and wonders because God is a God of signs. God is a God of the exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. As we see all the darkness and all the things happening all around us, we know as the body of Christ we're in that cleft of the rock. I'm not concerned about the financial things I see. I'm not concerned about wars or rumors of wars. I'm not concerned about plagues. Yeah, it's a little disheartening and it makes your flesh, but don't get weary. Don't take on the burden of it. I just keep my eyes on him. I'm fully persuaded that what he promised he's able also to perform. And so I'm excited because I know my blessed assurance is Jesus. "Blessed assurance, Jesus is mine! Oh, what a foretaste of glory divine! Heir of salvation, purchase of God, born of his Spirit, washed in his blood." I believe with all my heart that's you and me. And as believing believers, we're not doubters. We're overcomers. And I believe the best is yet to come for the body of Christ. Yeah, we're going to see darkness. Yeah, we're going to see trials and tribulations. He's told us. "But be of good cheer, I've overcome them all. I've overcome death. I've overcome sickness and disease. I've overcome it all." Why? Jesus paid the price for you and me to walk in victory. Ain't that wonderful? Jesus already paid it all. It's like having somebody who bought you a really nice something and you think you got to pay for it. They say, "No, it's free. It's been given to you. Grace is free. I gave it to you, son. I gave you healing. I gave you whatever you need. Salvation. I paid the price for you to walk in victory." And so, I want you to be encouraged today. You're a believing believer and you're not a doubter. We have that overcoming faith on the inside of us. We're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. And the moment we die, to be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. So if you tell me, "Well, Brandon, I'm believing for my healing and I've only got so many days left," I believe that Jesus is the miracle-working God. But I want to encourage you, even if you don't receive your miracle on this side of the earth, you still got your victory on the other side. Don't let the devil beat you down and say, "Well, you're running out of time." No, I'm not on your time scale. I'm on God's. "Well, you still haven't seen your full manifestation, Brandon, for your daughter." I'm not moved by it. I'm not moved by what I see. I'm not moved by what I feel. I'm moved by what the word of God says. And by his stripes, Megan is healed. By his stripes, I'm healed. By his stripes, you're healed. And we either stand on it, we are believing believers that believe it, or we don't. And I just have to be fully persuaded just like Abraham. And even in the deadness of Sarah's womb, even in the deadness of Abraham—he was old. He didn't have Viagra back then. We were all going, "What's going to happen with this old man?" But guess what? God performed a miracle. Signs and wonders followed him that believe. He was a hundred years old. And look what God did. God provided a son.
